content_body:
Cartecay Vineyards is located in Ellijay, GA, situated in the Eastern part of Gilmer County in the Cartecay region. The Southern Appalachians in North Georgia are ideal for growing wine grapes. The elevation, soil, and climate combine to produce wine grapes of the highest quality and, subsequently, fine wines.

Its Western facing slopes allow for the vines to receive maximum sun exposure with elevations ranging from 1650 ft. to 1750 ft. Cartecay's topography help keep the vines' "feet" dry and clay loam soils, which are conducive to growing grapes.

Visit Cartecay Wine & Craft in downtown Blue Ridge and Ellijay for a downtown tasting room in case visiting the vineyard is not in the scedule.
title: Cartecay Vineyard
